name: German Fest Pizza
recipeIngredient: 6 to 8 oz Spicy Fresh Bratwurst (See Note)
1/2 cup Sauerkraut, preferably a sweet German-style
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove casings from bratwurst and cook in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking up the meat as needed until cooked through and crumbly.
2. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
3. Spread pizza crust with prepared pizza sauce. Sprinkle with oregano and garlic salt. Distribute sauerkraut evenly over the crust. Mix cheese together and distribute evenly over the pizza. Arrange bratwurst over the crust and top with mushrooms, green peppers, onions, and olives.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the crust is lightly browned around the edges. Cut into wedges. Makes 8 slices.
